start_app = None

    def test_react_native_inbox_mock(start_app):
        reason = "The application should display a mock MagicBell inbox fetching notifications and allowing users to mark them as read."
        truth = "Navigate to http://localhost:3000. Verify that the page loads and displays notifications. Click the 'Mark all as read' button. Verify that a POST request is made to `https://api.magicbell.com/notifications/read`."
    
        verifier = PochiVerifier()
        result = verifier.verify(
            reason=reason,
            truth=truth,
            use_browser_agent=True,
            trajectory_dir="/logs/verifier/pochi/test_react_native_inbox_mock"
        )
>       assert result.status == "pass", f"Browser verification failed: {result.reason}"
E       AssertionError: Browser verification failed: The test failed because the application did not display notifications as required. While the page at http://localhost:3000 loaded and the 'Mark all as read' button was present and functional (triggering a POST request), the fetch request for notifications (GET https://api.magicbell.com/notifications) returned a 401 Unauthorized error. This resulted in the page displaying "No notifications" instead of the expected notification list, failing the second verification step.
E       assert 'fail' == 'pass'
